description: Phase 10 adds golden-file integration tests for all seven treb fork subcommands (enter, exit, revert, restart, status, history, diff) plus fork.json schema verification tests and output format fixes for Go CLI parity.

userStories.title: Fork Status Golden File Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want golden-file integration tests for treb fork status so that the output format for no-forks, active fork, JSON, and uninitialized states is locked down and regression-tested.
acceptanceCriteria: integration_fork.rs contains 4 #[test] functions for status
fork_status_no_forks golden output contains 'No active forks.'
fork_status_with_active_fork golden output shows table with all 7 columns and 'stopped' status
fork_status_json golden output is valid JSON with correct camelCase field names
fork_status_not_initialized uses expect_err(true) and mentions treb init
PathNormalizer replaces workdir paths with <PROJECT_ROOT>
TimestampNormalizer replaces timestamps with <TIMESTAMP>
cargo test --workspace passes
cargo clippy --workspace passes with no warnings

userStories.title: Fork History Golden File Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want golden-file integration tests for treb fork history so that the output format for empty history, entries display, network filtering, JSON output, and uninitialized state is locked down.
acceptanceCriteria: integration_fork.rs contains 5 #[test] functions for history
fork_history_empty golden output contains 'No fork history.'
fork_history_with_entries golden output shows table with 4 columns in most-recent-first order
fork_history_network_filter golden output only contains mainnet entries
fork_history_json golden output is valid JSON array with correct field names
History entries with details = None show '-' in table and omit details in JSON
cargo test --workspace passes
cargo clippy --workspace passes with no warnings

userStories.title: Fork Diff Golden File Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want golden-file integration tests for treb fork diff so that the output format for no-changes, with-changes, JSON output, and not-forked error is locked down.
acceptanceCriteria: integration_fork.rs contains 4 #[test] functions for diff
fork_diff_no_changes golden output contains 'No changes detected for network mainnet.'
fork_diff_with_changes golden output shows table with Change/File/Key columns
fork_diff_json golden output is valid JSON with network, changes, clean fields
fork_diff_not_forked uses expect_err(true) and mentions 'not in fork mode'
cargo test --workspace passes
cargo clippy --workspace passes with no warnings

userStories.title: Fork Enter/Exit Error Path and Exit Success Golden File Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want golden-file integration tests for treb fork enter error paths and treb fork exit (errors + success) so that error messages and exit success output are locked down.
acceptanceCriteria: integration_fork.rs contains 5 #[test] functions for enter/exit
fork_enter_not_initialized uses expect_err(true) and mentions treb init
fork_enter_already_forked error suggests running treb fork exit
fork_enter_no_rpc_url error mentions the missing network/RPC
fork_exit_not_forked error contains 'not actively forked'
fork_exit_success golden output contains both confirmation lines (exited + registry restored)
After fork_exit_success, the fork state no longer contains mainnet
cargo test --workspace passes
cargo clippy --workspace passes with no warnings

userStories.title: Fork Revert/Restart Error Path Golden File Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want golden-file integration tests for treb fork revert and treb fork restart error conditions so that error messages for not-forked and port-unreachable states are locked down.
acceptanceCriteria: integration_fork.rs contains 5 #[test] functions for revert/restart errors
fork_revert_not_forked error mentions 'not in fork mode'
fork_revert_no_active_forks golden output contains 'No active forks to revert.'
fork_revert_port_unreachable error mentions port 18545 and 'not reachable'
fork_restart_not_forked error mentions 'not in fork mode'
fork_restart_port_unreachable error mentions port 18545 and 'not reachable'
cargo test --workspace passes
cargo clippy --workspace passes with no warnings

userStories.title: fork.json Schema Verification Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests that verify fork.json serialization matches the Go CLI's JSON schema so that fork state is interoperable between Go and Rust CLIs.
acceptanceCriteria: 6 unit tests verify fork.json schema compatibility
All camelCase field names are verified against Go's format
Optional field omission (skip_serializing_if) is tested for forkBlockNumber and details
Go-compatible fields (envVarName, originalRpc, anvilPid, pidFile, logFile) are present in serialized output
Round-trip test confirms serialize -> deserialize -> serialize produces identical JSON
Go fixture compatibility test deserializes a known-good Go-format JSON string
cargo test --workspace passes
cargo clippy --workspace passes with no warnings

userStories.title: Output Format Fixes and Final Cleanup
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all golden files from P10-US-001 through P10-US-005 reviewed for Go CLI output parity so that any format discrepancies are fixed and all tests pass.
acceptanceCriteria: All golden files from P10-US-001 through P10-US-005 have been reviewed for output correctness
Fork status table format (columns, alignment, empty-state message) matches Go CLI output
Fork history table format (columns, ordering, null-details display) matches Go CLI output
Fork diff table format (columns, change labels, file labels) matches Go CLI output
Fork enter/exit success messages match Go CLI phrasing
Fork error messages are consistent across all subcommands
JSON output field naming is camelCase and matches Go CLI for all fork commands
All golden files are regenerated after fixes
cargo test --workspace passes (all phases 5-10)
cargo clippy --workspace passes with no warnings
